RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0001 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: Metro Autos VIN: VIN87496AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 Nissan Leaf base 1 18,599 18,599 2 Destination fee 1 1,420 1,420 3 Options package 1 726 726 4 Doc fee 1 359 359 5 Tax 1 2,621 2,621 Total: $23,725
